use_cases: Social media profile links on personal portfolios and developer websites
Quick-access contact links on author or speaker profile pages
External profile links on SaaS product team pages
Follow buttons on creator or influencer landing pages
Connect links in developer conference speaker bios
ai_summary: A radial social menu component that displays social media icons orbiting around a central user avatar with continuous clockwise rotation animation. Icons are positioned using trigonometry (cos/sin calculations) and feature hover scale and shadow effects. The center uses a blue-to-indigo gradient with pulse animation, while orbital icons have white backgrounds with subtle shadows. Perfect for personal websites, portfolios, and profile pages needing elegant social link presentation.
